title: Roasted Australian Vegetables with a Twist
description: A delicious and refreshing roasted vegetable dish with an Australian twist. Perfect for a light dinner or as a side.

ingredients.name: Australian vegetables (such as carrots, zucchini, and bell peppers)

instructions: Toss the Australian vegetables with olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
While the vegetables are roasting, mix the roasted garlic aioli with chopped rosemary leaves.
Remove the vegetables from the oven and brush with the garlic aioli mixture.
Drizzle with floral honey and aerated balsamic glaze, if using.
Serve hot, garnished with additional rosemary leaves if desired.
